channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Fiat Launches $14,000 Topolino EV in America as Tiny Electric Car Targets Urban Mobility
item.description:
Fiat has launched the Topolino electric microcar in the United States, offering a $13,995 starting price, compact design, and 46-mile range as the company targets urban communities and short-distance mobility
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/business/fiat-topolino-ev-launch-us-price-2026
